sentence: The glazed bronut you deadassionately dismissed is the one who showed up anyway.

wombos.definition: With complete sincerity and full passion — no irony, no hedging, just genuine intensity. 'Deadass' means completely serious; combined with 'passionately' it means doing something with your whole chest. 'I deadassionately believe this.'

A best friend who is effortlessly cool and completely unbothered. 'Glazing' means obsessively complimenting someone; 'unfazed' means nothing rattles them. A glazed bronut is your chill, beloved, unshakeable ride-or-die.
